calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-24-2005 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-10-2005 Continued To May-31-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-10-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: SAUL MARTIN FERSTER FOR PLAINTIFF JOHN WAI
ROBERT SHEPARD FOR DEFENDANT SUSAN BETTS, ALSO PRESENT

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. CASE SETTLED. TERMS PLACED ON THE RECORD AS FOLLOWS:
SETTLEMENT TO BE SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES BY 5/27/05. TRIAL DATE OF 5/16/05 CONTINUED TO 5/31/05 AS A PROTECTED TRIAL DATE IF SETTLEMENT BREACHED.
DEFENDANT TO VACATE PREMISES AT 204 4TH AVE BY 8/15/05, 7PM. IF DEFENDANT AND GUEST, KEVIN JAMES KEOGH FULLY VACATE BY 7/15/05, 7PM, PLAINTIFF WILL PAY $10,000 TO DEFENDANT ISSUED TO TRUST ACCOUNT OF SHEPARD/ROSEN WITHIN 5 DAYS OF VACATING PREMISES. IF DEFENDANT AND GUEST REMAIN IN POSSESSION AFTER 7/15/05, ONLY $7000 WILL BE PAID BY PLAINTIFF TO DEFENDANT. SHOULD DEFENDANT AND GUEST REMAIN IN POSSESSION AFTER 8/15/05, $500 WILL BE WITHHELD FROM DEFENDANTS TO COMPENSATE PLAINTIFF FOR PROCEEDING WITH JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF WAIVES ALL RENT; ALL PARTIES TO BEAR OWN COSTS; AND MUTUAL RELEASE AND WAIVER OF ALL FUTURE CLAIMS EXCEPT FOR ENVIRONMENTAL ILLNESS. DEFENDANT AND GUEST HAVE NO CURRENT SYMPTOMS.
$1305 SECURITY DEFPOST TO BE PLACED IN ATTORNEY'S TRUST ACCOUNT, AND LETTER OF REFERENCE TO BE PROVIDED BY LANDLORD(NOT SAYING ANYTHING NEGATIVE) WITHIN 5 DAYS AFTER SIGNING SETTLEMENT.
DEFENDANT AND GUEST TO PROVIDE PLAINTIFF 48 HOUR NOTICE OF INTENTION TO MOVE. THERE WILL BE NO DEDUCTION OF SECURTIY DEPOSIT FOR LEAK OR RAIN DAMAGE OR NORMAL WEAR. A WRITTEN NOTICE IS REQUIRED IF ANY DEDUCTION IS MADE. DEFENDANTS MAY HAVE A STORAGE BIN OUTSIDE THE PREMISES UNTIL 8/15/05, IF ALLOWED BY THE CITY. ANYTHING LEFT BEHIND BY DEFENDANT MAY BE DISPOSED OF BY PLAINTIFF AFTER 5 DAYS NOTICE TO DEFENDANT'S ATTORNEY.
IF DEFENDANT AND GUEST VACATE PREMISES AND PLAINTIFF HAS POSSESSION FREE AND CLEAR OF ALL PERSONS AND PROPERTY, PLAINTIFF WILL FILE A DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE.


JUDGE PRO TEM: GUY STILSON; CLERK:BARBARA MORRIS;REPORTER: SUSAN LEE (218)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Deposition Subpoena For Production Of Records
Off Calendar Jan-14-2005 Granted Per Written Order
